about.intro: JPrunier Inc. is a technology gateway in the audiovisual, IT, and artificial intelligence domains. We provide our clients with recognized expertise in software development, system control, interface design, multiplatform integration, configuration, and administration of complex audiovisual solutions.
about.mission: To deliver quality technology services, optimize user experience, and ensure the reliability and security of integrated systems, according to the most demanding industry standards.
about.vision: A world where technology seamlessly adapts to human needs, creating spaces that inspire, collaborate, and innovate.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We pursue the highest standards in everything we do

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We embrace emerging technologies to solve complex challenges

values.title: Partnership
values.description: We build lasting relationships with clients and partners

values.title: Reliability
values.description: We deliver on our commitments with proven expertise

services.intro: From system architecture and software programming to AV-IT integration and system administration, JPrunier Inc. delivers high-performance technology solutions aligned with the operational needs of modern organizations.

main_services.title: Programming
main_services.description: Our programming services focus on the design and development of reliable, scalable and high-performance control and software solutions for AV and AI environments.
main_services.long_description: JPrunier develops custom firmware, control system applications, and AI-driven software for the audiovisual industry. As a Crestron Service Provider (CSP) with Master Platinum certification, we deliver robust solutions spanning from room control interfaces to cloud-connected AV management platforms. Our programming team works across Crestron SIMPL+, C#, Python, and modern web technologies to create seamless integrations between AV hardware and intelligent software layers.
bullets_left: Audio DSP, Dante, Video over IP
bullets_right: Module, driver, plugin for AI – AV industries

features.title: Crestron Control Programming
features.description: SIMPL+, SIMPL#, and C# programming for 3-Series and 4-Series processors, touch panels, and NVX endpoints.

features.title: Custom User Interfaces
features.description: Design and development of intuitive touch panel interfaces, web-based dashboards, and mobile control apps.

features.title: AI Integration Modules
features.description: Development of plugins and drivers connecting AV systems to AI platforms like OpenAI, Azure Cognitive Services, and custom ML models.

features.title: Cloud & DevOps
features.description: Azure-based deployment pipelines, database management, and cloud-hosted AV monitoring applications.

main_services.details: We develop custom firmware and applications for Crestron, AMX, and other control systems. Our expertise spans programming languages including SIMPL+, NetLinx, and C# to create robust, scalable solutions that integrate all aspects of your AV environment.

audiovisual_section.title: Audiovisual Expertise
audiovisual_section.description: JPrunier operates across B2B, B2C, and B2G sectors in Canada and Europe. Our programming expertise spans every layer of the audiovisual ecosystem, within architectures built on AV, IT, and AI technologies.

extended_programming.title: Complete Programming Services
items: Development and maintenance of Crestron applications
Q-SYS control, Lua scripting, and plug-in development
Python modules for Crestron and Q-SYS
Cross-technology development (Crestron, Q-SYS, .NET, Linux, Python, Web, Cloud, Azure, REST APIs)
User interface programming, including responsive interfaces
extended_programming.languages: SIMPL, SIMPL+, SIMPL#, .NET, OpenAI, CHTML5, Python, Q-SYS Lua scripting, Q-SYS plugin, Dante, AWS, Azure

ai_bridge_section.description: JPrunier bridges artificial intelligence and audiovisual technology. Our expertise in software development, AV-IT networking, protocol integration and multi-brand system standardization enables us to deliver solutions where AV hardware and AI software work as one.

main_services.title: Consulting
main_services.description: Our consulting services support engineering firms, technology architects, audiovisual consultants and system integrators in the design, optimization and standardization of complex technology environments.
main_services.long_description: JPrunier's consulting practice bridges the gap between audiovisual engineering, IT infrastructure, and artificial intelligence. We work alongside architecture firms, engineering consultancies, and enterprise IT teams to design technology ecosystems that are future-ready. Whether you're planning a new headquarters, upgrading a campus, or exploring AI-enhanced collaboration spaces, our consultants bring deep technical knowledge and industry experience to every engagement.

features.title: Technology Assessment
features.description: Comprehensive evaluation of existing AV and IT infrastructure with recommendations for modernization and optimization.

features.title: System Design & Architecture
features.description: Detailed technical designs for conference rooms, auditoriums, command centers, and smart building environments.

features.title: Vendor Selection Support
features.description: Impartial guidance on technology selection, helping you choose the right platforms and equipment for your needs.

features.title: Project Management
features.description: End-to-end project oversight ensuring timelines, budgets, and quality standards are met throughout the integration process.

main_services.details: Our consultants work with you to understand your needs and design solutions that maximize ROI.

main_services.title: Administration
main_services.description: Our administration services ensure the reliability, supervision and performance of audiovisual and network systems.
main_services.long_description: Keeping AV and IT systems running at peak performance requires constant vigilance and expertise. JPrunier provides comprehensive administration services including remote monitoring, proactive maintenance, firmware management, and incident response. Our team acts as an extension of your IT department, ensuring uptime and reliability across all your audiovisual and network infrastructure.

features.title: Remote Monitoring & Support
features.description: 24/7 monitoring of AV systems with proactive alerts and rapid remote troubleshooting to minimize downtime.

features.title: Firmware & Software Updates
features.description: Scheduled maintenance cycles for control processors, DSPs, network switches, and collaboration platforms.

features.title: Network Administration
features.description: VLAN configuration, QoS optimization, and security management for AV-over-IP and Dante networks.

features.title: Performance Reporting
features.description: Regular reports on system health, usage analytics, and recommendations for capacity planning.

main_services.details: We provide ongoing system administration, monitoring, and maintenance to ensure your AV infrastructure operates at peak performance.

ai_bridge_section.title: AI – AV Bridge
ai_bridge_section.tagline: Connected audiovisual architectures designed for performance, scalability, and excellence in user experience.
ai_bridge_section.description: Our administration services ensure system stability across AV-IT-AI environments. We manage AV-IT networking including multicast architectures, Dante audio, Crestron XiO Cloud, Crestron Fusion, and Microsoft Azure environments.
capabilities: Dante audio configuration, optimization and monitoring
XiO Cloud and Crestron Fusion integration and development
Microsoft Azure environment management and supervision

main_services.title: Integration
main_services.description: JPrunier Inc. provides software implementation and configuration for all audiovisual equipment.
main_services.long_description: JPrunier delivers turnkey integration services that bring together audiovisual hardware, control systems, networking, and AI capabilities into cohesive, reliable environments. From boardrooms and classrooms to large-scale command centers, we handle the complete deployment lifecycle. Our integration methodology ensures every component works together seamlessly, with thorough commissioning and documentation.

features.title: Hardware Deployment
features.description: Professional installation and configuration of displays, projectors, cameras, microphones, speakers, and control systems.

features.title: AV-over-IP Networks
features.description: Design and deployment of Dante, AES67, and NVX video-over-IP networks for flexible, scalable distribution.

features.title: Collaboration Room Setup
features.description: Complete deployment of Microsoft Teams Rooms, Zoom Rooms, and Cisco Webex devices with optimized audio and video.

features.title: Commissioning & Training
features.description: Rigorous testing, documentation, and end-user training to ensure smooth handoff and long-term satisfaction.

main_services.details: From design through deployment, we handle the complete integration process.

ai_bridge_section.description: JPrunier delivers integration services that bring together AV hardware, control systems, networking, and AI capabilities. We provide software deployment and configuration for all audiovisual and IT equipment, including unified communications platforms.
capabilities: Unified communications integration (Microsoft Teams, Zoom, Cisco)
